date.headline: 99Educare - HR Admin
date.text:
• Maintained paper personnel files and updated employee records by hand.
  • Organized job applications and scheduled interviews via telephone and email.
  • Prepared new hire packets and gave office tours to new staff members.
  • Filed sensitive documents in locked cabinets to keep information private.
  • Handled the logistics for office meetings and company holiday parties.

• Identified and approached potential candidates through cold calling and networking.
  • Screened resumes and conducted preliminary phone interviews to assess candidate suitability.
  • Managed the interview process between the client and the candidate, including feedback loops.
  • Verified candidate references and professional qualifications before final submissions.
date.headline: Sofomation Energy - Recruitment Consultant
Freelance Content Developer
date.text:
• Produced education-focused content including career documents, LinkedIn profiles, technology articles, and blog content for diverse client needs.
  • Developed stakeholder communication skills and experience translating complex information into accessible, audience-appropriate formats.

date.headline: Rose English Homestay - EFL Tutor
date.text:
• Adapted ready-made lesson plans into personalised, learner-centred experiences for young learners and adults across online and offline delivery formats.
  • Designed formative homework tasks, assessed learner outputs, and maintained performance records to inform ongoing instructional adjustments.

date.headline: Apollo English Junior - EFL Teacher
date.text:
• Implemented and contextualised predesigned instructional frameworks for young learner programmes, adapting content sequencing to meet mixed-ability cohort needs.
  • Conducted placement testing and diagnostic assessments to support learner profiling and appropriate curriculum pathway allocation.
  • Developed supplementary materials and differentiated task sets to address identified learner gaps, improving curriculum accessibility and learning outcomes.

date.headline: Core Expertise & Design Methodology (Since 2023)
date.text:
• Curriculum Development: Scope and Sequence Design for EFL/ESP programs.
  • LXD & Instructional Design: Expertise in ADDIE, Backward Design, and UDL.
  • Assessment Architecture: CEFR-Aligned Assessment and IELTS Band Descriptor application.
  • Learner-Centered Analysis: Persona Development, Needs Analysis, and Scenario-Based Learning.

date.headline: British Council - Teacher of English & LXD
date.text:
• Designed outcomes-driven curriculum sequences for adult and young learner programmes, mapping learning objectives to CEFR descriptors and institutional quality standards.
  • Developed structured lesson frameworks integrating communicative tasks, real-world scenarios, formative checkpoints, and summative assessment — ensuring coherent scope and sequence across course levels.
  • Authored assessment instruments aligned to CEFR band descriptors; applied performance data to iteratively refine instructional design decisions.
  • Collaborated cross-functionally with academic leads to maintain curriculum consistency, quality assurance, and alignment to learner outcomes across multiple course strands.
  • Contributed to professional learning communities (INSET) and applied reflective design practice to continuously improve course materials and delivery models.

date.headline: AI & Future-Ready Learning (Since 2024)
date.text:
• AI Tool Development: Custom prompt design and AI-integrated learning workflows.
  • Generative AI Proficiency: ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, and DeepSeek (Prompt Engineering).
  • Data-Informed Design: Using audio/video signal processing and NLP for educational content.
  • Stakeholder Collaboration: Cross-functional project management and academic team leadership.

date.headline: Technical Stack & EdTech Integration (Since 2025)
date.text:
• Authoring Tools: Adapt Learning, H5P, eXeLearning, and Xerte (Open-source specialist).
  • LMS & Ecosystems: Expert-level Moodle configuration and SCORM/HTML5 deployment.
  • Advanced Tracking: Implementation of xAPI (Tin Can) for granular learning analytics and LRS integration.
  • Multimedia Design: Video & Audio Diarisation (speaker labeling, transcript alignment, and synchronization).
  • Graphic & Layout Design: Canva, MS Office, and Google Workspace.

date.headline: EFTeach Online - EFL Teacher & LXD
date.text:
• Design bespoke learning materials from scratch, ensuring they align with the specific professional needs of individual learners.
  • Apply instructional frameworks (such as Scaffolding or Task-Based Learning) to structure spontaneous "freetalk" lessons into coherent learning experiences.
  • Analyze learner needs to bridge the gap between their current proficiency and their professional communication goals.
  • Develop interactive digital assets and authentic resources that replace standard textbooks for highly specialized contexts.
  • Iterate on curriculum design based on student performance data and engagement levels to ensure maximum learning ROI.
  • Deliver high-impact Business English and ESP sessions to a global audience of adult professionals.
  • Prepare students for the IELTS exam by focusing on academic strategies and advanced linguistic proficiency.
  • Adapt complex technical concepts into accessible English for learners in specialized industries (ESP).
  • Assess learner progress through continuous evaluation and provide constructive, real-time feedback.

timeline.headline: Punit Jagatlal Ganjara
timeline.text:
I am a Learning Experience Designer specialized in the architecture of digital education. With 6+ years of experience, I bridge the gap between pedagogical theory (Backward Design, UDL) and technical execution. I specialize in the Moodle ecosystem and the deployment of accessible, interactive content using Adapt, H5P, eXeLearning, and Xerte. My approach focuses on creating SCORM-compliant, data-informed learning paths that leverage AI-powered tools and precise CEFR-aligned assessments to ensure measurable learner success in global blended environments.
Qualifications: MBA-HR, CELTA (Cambridge), TYLEC (Trinity College London), LXD-Certification (University of Michigan), ID-Certification (University of Illinois) 
Timeline: 
  1. EF Teach Online (March 2026 - Present)
  2. British Council (March 2023 - March 2026)
  3. Apollo English Junior (August 2019 - February 2023)
  4. Rose English Homestay (July 2019 - August 2019)
  5. Freelance Content Developer (2015 - 2019)
  6. Sofomation Energy (July 2014 - July 2015)
  7. 99Educare (April 2010 - March 2014)
Contact: ganjarapunit@gmail.com | https://www.linkedin.com/in/ganjarapunit/
